SEARCH
Package com.icarus.events

Class NotificationItem

java.lang.Object
com.icarus.events.NotificationItem
public class NotificationItem extends Object
Represents a notification item and manages the dispatching of notifications to users.

This class acts as a data model for notification content (title, message, recipients) and provides functionality to persist the notification to Firebase Firestore and trigger push notifications via NotificationHelper.

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationItem

      public NotificationItem(String eventId, String eventName, String eventImage, String sender, Boolean isEvent, ArrayList<String> recipients, String message, String type)
      Constructs a full NotificationItem with detailed event and recipient information.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the unique identifier of the related event
      eventName - the display name of the event
      eventImage - the URL or path to the event's promotional image
      sender - the identifier of the user or system sending the notification
      isEvent - true if this is an event-related alert, false for system alerts
      recipients - a list of user IDs who should receive this notification
      message - the text body of the notification
      type - the category/type of notification (e.g., "invite", "update")

    • NotificationItem

      public NotificationItem(String id, String eventId, String eventName, String eventImage, String message)
      Constructs a simplified NotificationItem typically used for display in lists.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique document ID from Firestore
      eventName - the name of the event associated with the notification
      eventImage - the image associated with the notification
      message - the content of the message

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique document ID for this notification.
      Returns:
      the Firestore document ID

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Sets the unique document ID for this notification.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier to set

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns the unique identifier of the event associated with this notification.
      Returns:
      the event ID string

    • getEventName

      public String getEventName()
      Returns the name of the event associated with this notification.
      Returns:
      the event name string

    • getEventImage

      public String getEventImage()
      Returns the image URL or resource path for the associated event.
      Returns:
      the event image string

    • getSender

      public String getSender()
      Returns the identifier of the user or system that sent the notification.
      Returns:
      the sender's identifier

    • getRecipients

      public ArrayList<String> getRecipients()
      Returns the list of user IDs designated as recipients of this notification.
      Returns:
      an ArrayList of recipient user IDs

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Returns the main message content of the notification.
      Returns:
      the notification message string

    • isEventNotification

      public boolean isEventNotification()
      Indicates whether this is an event-specific notification.
      Returns:
      true if it is an event notification, false otherwise

    • isSystemNotification

      public boolean isSystemNotification()
      Indicates whether this is a system-generated notification.
      Returns:
      true if it is a system notification, false otherwise

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns the category or type of the notification.
      Returns:
      the notification type string

    • setType

      public void setType(String type)
      Sets the category or type of the notification.
      Parameters:
      type - the notification type to set (e.g., "INVITE", "CANCEL")

    • setEvent

      public void setEvent()
      Configures this notification as an event-related alert.

      Sets the event flag to true and automatically disables the system flag.

    • setSystem

      public void setSystem()
      Configures this notification as a system-generated alert.

      Sets the system flag to true and automatically disables the event flag.

    • setRecipients

      public void setRecipients(ArrayList<String> users)
      Sets the full list of recipients for this notification.

      Creates a new ArrayList from the provided collection to prevent external modification of the internal list.

      Parameters:
      users - the list of user IDs to receive the notification

    • setMessage

      public void setMessage(String message)
      Sets the body text of the notification.
      Parameters:
      message - the message content to set

    • addRecipient

      public void addRecipient(String userId)
      Adds a single user to the recipient list if they are not already present.
      Parameters:
      userId - the unique identifier of the user to add

    • removeRecipient

      public void removeRecipient(String userId)
      Removes a specific user from the recipient list.
      Parameters:
      userId - the unique identifier of the user to remove

    • sendNotification

      public void sendNotification(android.content.Context context)
      Dispatches the notification to all specified recipients.

      This method performs a two-step process: 1. It saves the notification data to the Firestore "notifications" collection. 2. It iterates through the recipient list, retrieves their FCM tokens from the database, and sends a push notification to each of their registered devices using the NotificationHelper.

      Parameters:
      context - the context required to trigger network requests and access assets
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the message is null or empty
      IllegalStateException - if the recipient list is empty
